column1: # CI tier registry for poissonconsulting R packages, consumed by tools/sync-ci.sh.
# Format: one "<package> <tier>" per line. Tier is one of: cran | important | unimportant.
#   2. else if detected on CRAN    -> cran
# So you normally only list packages to PROMOTE to "important" (non-CRAN packages that still
# warrant a fuller matrix), or to force a tier. CRAN packages are auto-detected and additionally
# get the check-no-suggests workflow. private and jags are auto-detected too (never listed here).
# Core Bayesian engines and analysis infrastructure (fuller matrix, not necessarily on CRAN):
# Policy: every poissonconsulting package published on the r-universe
# (poissonconsulting.r-universe.dev) is important unless it is active on CRAN
# (active-CRAN packages are auto-detected and get the fuller cran tier + check-no-suggests).
# Archived-from-CRAN packages (e.g. batchr, err, flobr, dbflobr, readwritesqlite, rpdo) count as
# non-CRAN and so are listed here. Add a package here when it is added to the r-universe.
